observations: Full AI pipeline (investigation agents, evidence, hypothesis, Hindsight write) requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY which is documented as optional in .env.example; without it the triage falls back to low severity and resolves without investigation
docker-compose.yml references only causeflow-postgres, redis, hindsight, causeflow-api, causeflow-worker — no ministack, langfuse, or localstack-init

.env.example contains only PORT, DATABASE_URL, REDIS_URL, JWT_SECRET, TOKEN_ENCRYPTION_KEY, HINDSIGHT_BASE_URL, HINDSIGHT_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (optional), VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY, VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY — no AWS_*, STRIPE_*, CLERK_*, SENTRY_*, LANGFUSE_*, SVIX_*, SLACK_*, COMPOSIO_*, MASTRA_* vars
Spec mentions HINDSIGHT_API_URL but implementation uses HINDSIGHT_BASE_URL — .env.example correctly matches the implementation
